name: accounting firms managing 10–20 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10–20 clients, manual tracking of subscription renewals causes missed payments and client dissatisfaction. We provide automated notifications instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking multiple subscription renewals and anomalies for clients.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking multiple subscription renewals and anomalies for clients.
